THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KINRY C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEI, YAN WEN LEI, LI MEI WU $2,703.88 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,803.88, THE COURT DETERMINES THE FIVE YEAR MORATORIUM ON PASS THROUGH OF COSTS APPLIED ONLY TO THE PROPERTY TAX INCREASES, BUT MOT INSURANCE EXPENSES.
